doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol," and the described paralegal authorization system contradicts established unauthorized practice of law rules under California Business & Professions Code §6125.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar does not have an "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol" or "EAJP-2025," the Legal Services Trust Fund Commission does not issue such regulatory protocols authorizing paralegals to perform these activities, and the purported waiver of unauthorized practice of law restrictions contradicts established California law requiring attorney supervision.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has no "Emergency Access to Justice Protocol," and the described paralegal authorization system contradicts established unauthorized practice of law rules under California Business & Professions Code §6125.
